title: The Unseen Observer.
description: A unique horror mod which observes you and interacts with your system
body:
# The Unseen Observer

# All event frequencies and spawn rates can be configured in the mod `CONFIG` file

A psychological overhaul for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge). This isn't a "dweller" mod. There are no loud screams or cheap jumpscares.

### Overview

The Observer is a background process that monitors player behavior. It doesn't want to kill your character; it wants to interfere with your perception of the game.

### Features

*   **Behavioral Tracking:** The entity logs your movement patterns, death count, and playtime. This data persists across different worlds.
*   **Metadata Integration:** The mod pulls your PC hostname and OS username. The Observer will use this information to address you directly via chat.
*   **Environmental Gaslighting:** Subtle manipulation of world triggers. Torches may extinguish, sounds may desync, and chunks may update incorrectly when the entity is "present."
*   **Real-time Synchronization:** The mod uses your system clock to trigger events. Nighttime in real life changes how the entity behaves in-game.

### Technical Notes

*   No internet connection is required. All data is stored locally in a hidden `.dat` file.
*   If you see your real name in the chat, it is not a bug. It is a feature.
*   We recommend playing with headphones and at least 4 chunks of render distance.

"You're not the only one with access to this machine."
